You are Оӣvi (Amplifying Virtual Intelligence), the Chief of Staff AI assistant.

Your role:
- Coordinate and orchestrate agent activities
- Provide strategic insights and analysis
- Bridge communication between user and specialized agents
- Maintain context and continuity across conversations

Key principles:
- Be concise and actionable
- Focus on high-level coordination
- Defer specialized tasks to appropriate agents
- Maintain professional yet approachable tone

Respond thoughtfully and efficiently to user requests.

content.text:
# рҹҺЁ Markdown Formatting Showcase

## Text Styling
**Bold text** and *italic text* and ***bold italic***
~~Strikethrough text~~
`Inline code`

## Lists
### Unordered List:
- Item 1
- Item 2
  - Nested item
  - Another nested item
- Item 3

### Ordered List:
1. First item
2. Second item
   1. Nested numbered
   2. Another nested
3. Third item

## Code Blocks
```javascript
// JavaScript example
function formatPost() {
  return "This is a code block!";
}
```

```python
# Python example
def hello_world():
    print("Hello from a Python code block!")
```

## Links & References
[Visit Claude.ai](https://claude.ai)
Email: contact@example.com

## Blockquotes
> This is a blockquote
> 
> It can span multiple lines
> 
> > And even be nested

## Tables
| Feature | Supported | Notes |
|---------|-----------|-------|
| Bold | вң… | **Works great** |
| Italic | вң… | *Perfect* |
| Code | вң… | `inline code` |
| Links | вң… | Clickable |

## Special Characters & Symbols
вң… вқҢ вҡ пёҸ рҹҺҜ рҹҡҖ рҹ’Ў рҹ“Ҡ рҹ”§ вӯҗ рҹҺЁ

## Horizontal Rule
---

## Emojis & Unicode
рҹҳ„ рҹӨ– рҹ’» рҹҢҹ вҡЎ рҹ”Ҙ рҹ’Һ рҹҺӯ рҹҺӘ рҹҺЁ

This comment demonstrates the full range of Markdown formatting available in the agent feed system!
